message:
fix: migrate all kc-agent fetch calls to agentFetch() for auth (#10398)

Replace raw fetch() calls to LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL with agentFetch()
across 40 files (23 hooks, 17 components, ~69 call sites). This
ensures the KC_AGENT_TOKEN Authorization header is injected on every
kc-agent HTTP request, fixing 401 Unauthorized errors.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
